response: {"name":"Custom scripts (Illumina HiSeq demultiplexing + custom inline barcode demultiplexing)","description":"Custom pipeline scripts that perform a two-step demultiplexing process: standard Illumina HiSeq demultiplexing followed by a secondary demultiplexing step for libraries with distinct inline barcodes, appending the random-mer (UMI) to the read name in the output FASTQ for downstream deduplication.","language":"unknown","github_repo":null,"bioconda_package":null,"pypi_package":null,"cran_package":null,"license_type":"unknown","open_source_alternative":null,"docker_image":null}
